prose.en: Implement hardware separation mechanisms to facilitate process isolation.

guidance.en: Hardware-based separation of system processes is generally less susceptible to compromise than software-based separation, thus providing greater assurance that the separation will be enforced. Hardware separation mechanisms include hardware memory management.

prose.en: hardware separation is implemented to facilitate process isolation.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
system documentation for hardware separation mechanisms
system documentation from vendors, manufacturers, or developers
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
organizational personnel installing, configuring, and/or maintaining the system
System capability implementing underlying hardware separation mechanisms for process separation
